# Extract Specifications Prompt

> Full skill instructions and EARS format reference:
`.claude/skills/specifications-extractor/SKILL.md`
> Analysis checklist: `.claude/skills/specifications-extractor/references/analysis-checklist.md`
> Analysis process: `.claude/skills/specifications-extractor/references/analysis-process.md`
> EARS format guide: `.claude/skills/specifications-extractor/references/ears-format.md`
> Specification template:
`.claude/skills/specifications-extractor/references/specification-template.md`

## Usage

Invoke this prompt to reverse-engineer specifications from existing code in this project.

Follow the process documented in the source files above. Output should go to
`specifications/` at the project root (see existing
`specifications/gryffin-calorai-specifications.md`
as an example of the expected format and depth).
